items.content: Reply: 'Obama or Biden would have said yes and threw in a few billion to Iran... I don't see Trump taking this deal. Stone age, here they come.'
Trump told JD and Jared he'd blow Iran's biggest bridge 45 min after they called saying 'I think they're breaking their deal' — Trump: 'oh well, tell them to look out their window'
BBC News: Trump threatens to take out Iran in 'one night' if no deal before Tuesday deadline. Wants Tehran to reopen Strait of Hormuz.
"I can't talk about ceasefire." Trump says US has 'an active, willing participant on the other side.' Claims 'They (Iranians) would like to be able to make a deal.'
CNBC: Asia-Pacific markets set to open higher as investors assess mixed messaging on Iran war. Trump renewed threat to target civilian infrastructure if no peace deal in <24hrs.
US stocks whipsaw as Trump warns Iran strikes could escalate by Tuesday — casting doubt on ceasefire hopes.
Reply: 'They've destroyed US's reputation by attacking Iran during diplomatic negotiations on several occasions. Iran has no reason to believe them hence why they're not agreeing to a ceasefire.'
Trump issues 48-hr ultimatum to Iran to open Strait of Hormuz. Iran retaliates, rejects US ceasefire proposal. US recovers downed F-15 pilots. Iran claims it shot down 3 US aircraft during rescue.

BREAKING: Iran has delivered its highly anticipated '10-point' response to the US '15-point peace plan.' Points include: 1. Guarantee Iran will not be attacked again 2. Permanent end to war, not just ceasefire 3. End to Israeli strikes in Lebanon 4. [continues]
Trump: 'OPEN THE F****N STRAIT' — Trump threatens Iran with 'living in hell' if Strait of Hormuz not opened. Declares Tuesday as 'power plant and bridge day.'
BREAKING: Trump will hold military news conference tomorrow 1PM ET — 3 hours after 48-hour Iran warning expires. Declares Tuesday 'power plant and bridge day.'
Iran rejected proposed ceasefire yesterday afternoon — White House called lid, Trump not expected publicly for rest of day.
Iran rejects a 45-day ceasefire proposal, saying it wants a permanent end to the war rather than a temporary pause.
BREAKING: Donald Trump rejects ceasefire he proposed to Iran.
Both US and Iran reject ceasefire proposal terms. Trump insists on Hormuz free passage. (Argus Media)
Trump: 'We have a plan where every bridge in Iran will be decimated by 12 o'clock tomorrow night, every power plant will be out of business.'
Russia Demands US Drop Ultimatums Offers Mediation; Iran Rejects US Ceasefire Terms; US Isfahan Flop.
Iran views the war and Strait of Hormuz as a crucial bargaining chip to extract concessions from Washington.
President Trump says he wants to seize Iran's oil. 'It's there for the taking. There's not a thing they could do about it.'
Fear among retail investors rising: ROBO Put/Call Ratio up to 1.0, highest in at least 20 years.
Gold now trades more than most major financial assets: Average trading volume in gold averaged ~$361 billion/day in 2025, nearly 3x 2021.

market_data.SP500_reaction: Asia-Pacific markets set to open higher; US stocks whipsawed; ceasefire doubts causing volatility
market_data.Dow: +1100 pts rally on ceasefire hopes (earlier session)
market_data.Fear_indicator: ROBO Put/Call Ratio at 1.0 — highest in 20 years

key_deadlines.Tuesday_8PM_ET: Trump deadline for Iran deal (midnight ET = 12:00 CST Wed Apr 8)
key_deadlines.Wednesday_1PM_ET: Trump military press conference (3 hrs after deadline expires)
key_deadlines.Tuesday_declare: 'Power plant and bridge day' — Trump threatens to destroy all Iranian bridges and power plants

negotiation_status.US_15_point_plan: Offered by US; Iran delivered 10-point counter-response
negotiation_status.Iran_10_points: 1. Guarantee no further attacks on Iran 2. Permanent war end (not just ceasefire) 3. End Israeli strikes in Lebanon 4. [more not visible]
negotiation_status.Trump_rejects: Iran's own ceasefire terms; demands Hormuz access
negotiation_status.Both_reject: Neither side accepts the other's terms
negotiation_status.Russia_role: Offering mediation, demanding US drop ultimatums
